items.original_title: China's new World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization is President Xi's clearest play yet for a parallel AI order
items.title_en: China's new World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization is President Xi's clearest play yet for a parallel A…
items.summary_en: At the World AI Conference in Shanghai, Xi Jinping announced 5,000 AI training slots for Global South countries and the launch of the "World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization." Cooperation centers with ASEAN, the African Union, BRICS, and other alliances are planned to follow. China is systematically bu…
items.title_zh: 中国成立世界人工智能合作组织，旨在构建平行的人工智能治理结构
items.summary_zh: 中国新成立的世界人工智能合作组织在上海的世界人工智能大会上宣布，旨在建立一个与西方不同的人工智能治理结构。这一计划标志着中国在全球人工智能领域的影响力扩展。

items.original_title: The Pentagon's new AI playbook treats slow adoption as a bigger risk than imperfect alignment
items.title_en: The Pentagon's new AI playbook treats slow adoption as a bigger risk than imperfect alignment
items.summary_en: The US Department of the Navy has signed a strategy to "weaponize" data and AI and build an "AI-first" fleet. Large language models would run directly on warships, and an AI war council would prioritize mission scenarios. The core message is that moving too slowly carries greater risks than "imperfect alignment." The…
items.title_zh: 美国海军新人工智能游戏手册：慢速采纳比不完美对齐更具风险
items.summary_zh: 美国海军发布新人工智能游戏手册，强调数据和人工智能的武器化，迅速转型为“人工智能第一”的舰队。手册指出，缓慢采纳的风险高于不完美的对齐。

items.original_title: Open-weight models now match frontier cyber performance from just four months ago at a fraction of the cost
items.title_en: Open-weight models now match frontier cyber performance from just four months ago at a fraction of the cost
items.summary_en: The British AI Security Institute warns that open-weight models like GLM-5.2 and DeepSeek V4-Pro now trail closed frontier models in cyber capabilities by four to seven months. At the start of 2025, the gap was still six to ten months. It also found that safety measures on open models are largely ineffective, leaving…
items.title_zh: 开放权重模型在网络能力上已与封闭模型持平，警示安全措施不足
items.summary_zh: 英国人工智能安全研究所警告，开放权重模型在网络能力上已经可以与封闭模型媲美。这突显了安全措施的不足，给防御者带来更短的准备时间。

items.summary_en: Nodes for generating seamless tiles with any model GitHub: 12 stars, 2 forks.
items.title_zh: 金融代理API：多代理框架与智能金融的未来
items.summary_zh: 金融代理API联动多代理框架，为可扩展人工智能系统提供智能金融、观察性和安全治理的能力，具备863个分叉和129个星标。

items.original_title: Anthropic slashes Claude Fable 5 limits in Max and Team Premium and pushes Pro users toward API pricing
items.title_en: Anthropic slashes Claude Fable 5 limits in Max and Team Premium and pushes Pro users toward API pricing
items.summary_en: Anthropic will include Claude Fable 5 in Max and Team Premium plans starting July 20, but at just 50 percent of regular limits, which themselves drop by a third that same day. Pro users get a one-time $100 credit, then pay API rates. The reversal from Anthropic's original plan to pull Fable from subscriptions entirely…
items.title_zh: Anthropic削减Claude Fable 5使用限制，以应对市场竞争
items.summary_zh: Anthropic削减Claude Fable 5在Max和Team Premium计划中的使用限制，以应对市场竞争压力。这一改变反映了AI市场的动态与竞争。

items.original_title: AI chatbots reading X-rays can be dangerously confident even when they're wrong
items.title_en: AI chatbots reading X-rays can be dangerously confident even when they're wrong
items.summary_en: The RadLE 2.0 benchmark tests whether AI models in radiology can tell when they should leave a diagnosis to a human. Many models deliver wrong findings with full confidence, and human radiologists are still well ahead. Before AI can diagnose on its own, it needs to learn when it's better to say nothing. The article AI…
items.title_zh: 放射学AI模型在错误诊断中表现出危险的自信
items.summary_zh: RadLE 2.0基准测试显示，许多放射学AI模型即使错误诊断，也会以完全的信心进行宣称。这显示出AI在医疗领域的局限性和风险。

items.original_title: AI text detectors struggle when language models mimic an author's style
items.title_en: AI text detectors struggle when language models mimic an author's style
items.summary_en: Epoch AI tested three leading AI text detectors (Pangram, GPTZero, and Originality.ai) using style-imitated texts. Up to 18 percent of AI-generated passages went undetected. For scientific writing, the miss rate climbed as high as 48 percent, the very genre where these detectors likely see the most real-world use. The…
items.title_zh: AI文本检测器在语言模型模仿作者风格时表现不佳
items.summary_zh: Epoch AI测试发现，当语言模型模仿作者风格时，AI文本检测器的有效性显著下降。科学写作中，未检测到的错误率高达48%。

items.summary_en: 乔木智能视频导演 Skill：素材治理、双语字幕、品牌包装与可复现渲染 | Agent-native video director with governed sourcing and verifiable rendering GitHub: 61 stars, 9 forks.
items.title_zh: Qiaomu-Cut Skill：智能视频导演功能的新项目
items.summary_zh: 新项目Qiaomu-Cut Skill推出，可实现智能视频导演功能，支持素材治理及双语字幕，当前在GitHub上获得61个星标。
